text: Standing at the threshold of this glass-walled room, I sense the stillness and anticipation of curiosity. The modern, almost clinical architecture stands in contrast to the vibrant, inviting colors and displays inside. Entering further and absorbing the 'R+D' wall, I am enveloped in a sense of intellectual adventure. The gentle uncertainty described on the screen resonates with my own feelings—a mixture of hope and ambiguity, where research and exploration coexist. The mood is reflective, poised between what is known and what could yet be discovered. I feel optimistic, inspired by the idea that humans can connect, create, and adapt meaningfully, even amid uncertainty.
